title: Musithy
description: Musithy is a Minecraft mod that adds a Retro Boombox and Cassette Tapes with different variants (Default, Nether, End). Insert a cassette to play Minecraft-styled music made from block sounds!
body:
**Music Credits** - [Suluntulu](https://www.youtube.com/@suluntulu/videos) **Required Mod**

 

 

**Musithy** Experience a new way to enjoy music in Minecraft with Musithy! This mod adds a Retro Boombox and Cassette Tapes that play Minecraft-styled music created from in-game block sounds. There are four Default Cassettes, one Nether Cassette, and one End Cassette, each with unique tracks that match their theme. Cassettes cannot be crafted but can be found as rare loot: Default Cassettes drop from Creepers and can be found in spawner chests, the Nether Cassette is obtained through Piglin bartering or found in Bastion chests, and the End Cassette is hidden in End City chests. Insert a Cassette into the Retro Boombox to bring atmospheric, handcrafted music into your world. Whether you're relaxing at home or exploring new dimensions, Musithy enhances your Minecraft adventure with immersive, block-based melodies!
